title: rename roughness lengths and rm ozark_conservation_setup

body:
This PR sets the cache key for Julia dependencies so it's more likely to be reused, and doesn't create a new item for every single PR/workflow/attempt. With the old caching setup, I believe the cache would only be hit if rerunning a failed workflow job.

This will probably need to be propagated to other workflows, but it would be good to check if this will stop GitHub Actions from creating so many caches.

## TODO

- [x] Push a trivial change to this branch to ensure the cache is hit and reused
- [x] Check if there are more files we should be caching, e.g., precompiled Julia code?
title: Set Julia depot cache key manually to reduce the number of cache items
